title: Kevin's Client
description: Better Call Kevin... Oh wait, that's me now.
body:
# Kevin's Client
The first (to my knowledge) **anti-horror** mod. Essentially can be used for... _dealing_ with any entities in your game. The Cave Dweller? AESed. The Broken Script? AESed too. Even non-horror mods that are just insanely powerful; AESed.

## But what _is_ AES?
**AES** (Anti-Entity System) is the main feature of this mod. It is a toggleable system that will instantly kill and/or despawn any non-vanilla mob in a 32-block cubic radius. 

This mod also features an Auto NBT tool system to give you some basic starter gear immediately, and an example entity to test on in case you're mod developing (cough cough me) or don't want to install horror mods.
